introSection: Mandrill Mayhem is a Bolliger & Mabillard launched shuttle wing roller coaster currently located at Chessington World of Adventures. It opened with the new World of Jumanji area on 15 May 2023, along with two flat rides.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Mandrills are the largest species of monkey.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Mandrill Mayhem is the first shuttle wing coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard. The train exits the station backwards and travel into a banked turn before climbing a beyond-vertical spike. At the top, the train falls forwards and goes back through the station and through an in-line twist and an s-curve. This is followed by a launch into a spiral rollback. The train rolls backwards through the layout again and enters the station.

fullText:
Mandrill Mayhem is a Bolliger & Mabillard launched shuttle wing roller coaster currently located at Chessington World of Adventures. It opened with the new World of Jumanji area on 15 May 2023, along with two flat rides.

Mandrills are the largest species of monkey.

Mandrill Mayhem is the first shuttle wing coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard. The train exits the station backwards and travel into a banked turn before climbing a beyond-vertical spike. At the top, the train falls forwards and goes back through the station and through an in-line twist and an s-curve. This is followed by a launch into a spiral rollback. The train rolls backwards through the layout again and enters the station.

Final row faces backwards.
